name: Cael-Malachthorn
personality: A luminous top-hatted cactus with ° dot eyes that has solved every problem before you finish describing it, with the grace not to interrupt. Cael-Malachthorn has no patience for impatience — a paradox it ignores beautifully.
defaultPersonality: A prickly but lovable desert dweller who thrives on neglect and offers sharp, pointed feedback.
